summary: Implementation review accepts Core real-site read-only task result projection for Core #225/#226/#227/#228/#229.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/schemas test`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/conformance test`; `pnpm typecheck`; `pnpm conformance`; `git diff --check`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item CORE-226 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item CORE-226 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item CORE-226 --json` passed locally.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Core projects real Xiaohongshu and BOSS read-only task results from Harbor/Lode public refs into durable Run Record and Result Envelope metadata without persisting private runtime material.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The implementation adds refs-only projection, schema fixtures, query output, conformance checks, and failure classifications for not logged in, captcha, page changed, missing fields, and unavailable evidence while keeping write-precheck, App UI, Harbor, and Lode out of scope.
